nodes.label: 5. Crucial Logic Rules & Constraints (DO NOT BREAK)
nodes.norm_label: 5. crucial logic rules & constraints (do not break)

nodes.label: Push-to-Talk Communication System
nodes.rationale: One-to-one voice communication between dashboard and truck tablets, requiring always-on standby even when screen is off.

nodes.label: WebSocket Relay Server
nodes.rationale: Acts as a switchboard router forwarding binary PCM audio or JSON voice messages between clients without processing them.

nodes.label: Android Foreground Service
nodes.rationale: Mandatory registration for Android 14+ to prevent system Doze/Battery Saver from killing WebSocket or Audio Recorder.

nodes.label: Real-time Monitoring
nodes.rationale: Tracking and status monitoring of truck devices.
